neighborhoods.name: Vegueta (Las Palmas)
neighborhoods.description: Historic colonial quarter where Columbus stopped en route to America, with cathedral and Casa de Colon
neighborhoods.character: Colonial historic, Columbus heritage, cultural quarter

housing.predominantType: Apartments in colonial and Canarian buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Tenerife. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Maspalomas / Playa del Ingles
neighborhoods.description: Southern Gran Canaria resort area with iconic sand dunes, year-round sunshine, and European retirees

housing.predominantType: Resort apartments, bungalows, and holiday complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Tenerife's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Las Palmas - Escaleritas / Miller Bajo
neighborhoods.description: Central residential neighborhoods with local life and lower costs than the beach areas
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Las Canteras (Las Palmas)
neighborhoods.description: Urban beach with one of the best city beaches in Europe, surf culture, and international residents
neighborhoods.character: Urban beach, surf culture, international residents
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
